author: mroguljic
body:
#### PR description:

This PR adds a process customizer that can be used to switch the instances of template pixel CPE ("WithAngleAndTemplate") to generic CPE ("WithTrackAngle"). This is to be used for easier evaluation of generic-only pixel performance requested, for example [here](https://gitlab.cern.ch/cms-ppd/dataset-management/data-reprocessing/-/work_items/36). No changes are expected in the output since it is not used in any workflows.

#### PR validation:

Code compiles and was tested on this reReco configuration

```
step2 --conditions 150X_dataRun3_Prompt_Candidate_2026_02_22_12_50_56 --customise Configuration/DataProcessing/RecoTLR.customisePostEra_Run3 --data --datatier RECO,DQMIO --era Run3_2025 --eventcontent RECO,DQM --filein filelist:step1_files.txt --fileout file:step2.root --lumiToProcess step1_lumi_ranges.txt --nStreams 2 --nThreads 4 --no_exec --number 1000 --process reRECO --python_filename step_2_cfg.py --scenario pp --step RAW2DIGI,L1Reco,RECO,DQM --no_exec
```
by using `process = replacePixelCPETemplatesToGeneric(process)`. The resulting edmConfig shows no usage of template CPE.

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

To be backported to 16_0_X, 15_1_X, and 15_0_X.

https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50254
https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50255
https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50256
title: Customizer to turn off pixel template cpe
